text: it s as good as any starbucks mediocre at best

i ve been to probably over different starbucks this particular starbucks is the most friendly and consistent i ve been to the other day they gave me my order for free for a christmas present that s great customer service it s located in the hyatt so it s quite busy during conventions but the speed of service is great they always have enough staff and they are all friendly

i really like this starbucks everyone is generally very friendly and the drinks are always good my only real qualm is drive through speed can be a little slow all in all it s still my favorite sbux in the area
these are really cute but they hurt behind my ears a little

i love this location it s bigger than their old location down the street the staff is very nice and respectful they are fairly fast at making your drink depending upon how crowed it is i ll definitely be coming back

i m used to quality service came back from europe where baristas are awesome i drive about minutes to get to this starbucks and their service is getting worse every time i come here two days in a row i asked for a brownie and chocolate chip cookie at pm and they are out of it those are two main things a coffee shop should have coffee was good tho so i will be taking my business else where can t go to red lion and blvd or the one inside target which is the worst of them all probably try abington area next time
this place rocks great friendly staff who are efficient and fluent in coffee drinks a

the clip part that holds your hair in place on the wand is way too tight very hard for me to open it wide enough and it pulls and tugs my hair badly as i try to slide it down the strands i have to continually open it a bit then release close open release down the length of the strand instead of sliding it i've never had to return an item from amazon but i am considering it with this one however i'm thinking maybe the clamp part will loosen up eventually so may not return because other than that flaw it's fine
love the crew at this location the only thing that makes me not go as often is the long drive thru line that s out into the street on some mornings

terrible starbucks mainly because the workers have no common sense instead of handing the drink to the person from the window they put it on the counter next to the register doesn t need to be that difficult or take that long timed my drive through experience minutes insane

i will literally drive way out of my way for this starbucks most starbucks i go to are very inconsistent and the frappuccinos are very thin melted etc this place is always on point i have never had a bad drink come out of that building i always order to go because this is on my route to work and it is always ready for me the staff is always super friendly and kind i absolutely love love love this starbucks the staff and drinks are high quality it s always clean love it i go to every starbucks in the area and honestly none of them hold a candle to this one starbucks please recognize these employees for the great employees and humans that they are

some of the employees are nice some are in too much of a hurry to get back to whatever else they re doing drinks have been messed up have had drinks shoved out the drive thru window with a quick have a good day and the door closed on my face before i could even ask for a straw all in all not impressed i ve come back to lower my rating this location is awful all of my drinks taste terrible like they let the espresso go bad before it makes it into my drink burnt flavor the staff is really lackluster i ve spoken with mike rose district manager twice and no results have come from the discussions he and i have had oh yeah i ll talk to my crew and make sure they make sure to give you a straw i ll talk to them about not speaking to the customers in a rude tone of voice well the lady with the blonde hair and glasses still snips as customers i ve decided to go out of my way and walk into the warminster starbucks fabulous workers and the drinks are always on point
i m not amused the people behind me are getting there orders first how hard is it to get a vanilla sweet cream cold brew and a cookie at least employees and they are all clueless
the brown color was really on the red side and the tip is too thick and flimsy so it really doesn't give that microblade effect

this is without a doubt my favorite starbucks it s brand new and is so nice the interior is beautiful they have high top tables with outlets attached you can sit or stand while working they also have tables against the wall that you can sit at they also have bigger comfy chairs in the corners by the windows this starbucks is pretty big and has so many places to sit the staff here is also really nice they area always so friendly and make our drinks really quickly i think that this starbucks is great for all kinds of people a great place for people who want to do work or study and great for people who are meeting up with friends this has quickly become my favorite place to study and do homework i highly suggest checking it out
very convenient downtown moorestown location sometimes long line due to rich escalade moms buying all their kids lattes and macchiatos

great location and easy to get into go at least times a week staff is very friendly and always remembers my favorite drink manager tiffany is friendly and always engaging seems like there are already regulars there and a great place to check your emails keep up the great work btw this is the stand alone store not the one in the target
fits well and warm but it gets really itchy

this has been one of my favorite caf s since it was a hour store it s not open all night anymore but still a good cafe clean restrooms and strong wifi signal recently renovated in a retro design and the baristas wear vintage style hats and ties i always stop here when i m in the area

decent starbucks very small parking lot maybe spots behind it is a huge lake in the winter when it s frozen it turns into an ice rink kids and adults alike play hockey and twirl around from morning till sunset they all pile into starbucks to warm up after so it s always busy during the winter there s about tables chairs down one side of the store there are four leather club chairs by the front window which are a coveted spot across the front there s a counter top with some stools two big clean bathrooms in the back with baby changing stations the place was clean my particular barista couldn t have been nicer there s also additional seating out back overlooking the scenic lake for the warmer months the only thing missing is a fireplace the newtown location has one which makes it my favorite location but they closed today for weeks of renovations ahh now i have to get my caffeine fix someplace else till they reopen all in all this location is nice clean mobile service is quick

this is a review for the charbucks next to the wyndham garden inn on route in exton this starbucks is walk able from there and literally saved me throughout the weekend of a conference where i was forced to stay at the wymdham i came here for breakfast got some decent coffee and a breakfast sandwich which beat the heck out of the pre packaged grab go garbage that the hotel was offering i alsostopped in around pm during a break in the conference and got a much needed macchiatto sp thank you fourbucks
coffee is ok staff is great but it is consistently cold in here turn the heat on please

no carmel or brown sugar syrup so they can t make the drink they re currently advertising huh also i can t scan my starbucks rewards to earn points because this location inside target is not setup for this capability not really sure why not and def disappointed the macchiato also tasted bitter the sugar helps to cut down on it but i could def taste it and it didn t go down smoothly like other ones that have been made for me the customer service was really good besides the shortage of syrups to not be able to make the original drink i wanted i won t be back i expect better for a coffee that costs no dining at this location because the chairs are still up on the table

it works ok for pain relief while wearing dentures but it's too thick it's so thick it's like putty and it moves when i put my dentures in it's not really a waste of money for me i'll use it even though it doesn't stay put

had a nice time here came here on a saturday morning to do some work on my laptop the staff were nice they were busy so it was a little loud in there but they did get my order in a timely manner i was not too thrilled about the seating arrangement it felt like you didn t really have your own spot but was not a big deal typical starbucks

without question this is the slowest starbucks i have ever been to i have now been standing for minutes awaiting two drinks that i have already paid for given the expected holiday demand this location is extremely inefficient find another location

the baristas are kind my favorites are chase and david the staff are interesting characters and the crowd is varied and fun sometimes the line forms oddly because it s not yet redesigned the way i am used to from living on the other coast and since it gets quite a lot of traffic sometimes that means odd lines and disorganization sometimes my iced chai latt s arrive almost instantly though ask david for a grandr if you like iced espresso

i am a huge starbucks customer and i have to say that this is my all time favorite starbucks location i ve gone to this starbucks location for probably four years now and have never been disappointed or had any issues with the service all of the employees are extremely kind and welcoming the space is always very clean and well kept there is plenty of space the service is superb joey who i am assuming is a manager does an amazing job of ensuring that the customers are taken care of and leave satisfied with their visit when i do come to this specific starbucks location i am usually there for multiple hours doing work and i find myself choosing to come to this specific location over any others even if it is minutes away while a starbucks is right next door to me just because i enjoy this location that much more i can definitely say that they are doing a wonderful job and that i feel extremely welcomed and valued as a customer of this location keep up the great service guys
this location is living up to the starbucks standards for sure the only issue is the placement of the building you can t see it from the road so you can easily pass other than that two thumbs up
we buy a house over here off central and are thrilled because starbucks is hours and i literally use you hours and now you change that done will no longer be a a patron of this starbucks
reno nv great service awesome baristas skinny vanilla latte one shot two shot and no no no sugar

pulled in quick for some coffee after driving hours and more hours to go from texas to cali the employees were very pleasant and fast that s why i chose starbucks over any other place they teach employees the quality of customers service and hire nothing but the best

filthy dirty we were there at am and it was disgustingly dirty then i had to go to the bathroom big mistake as i walked in something green dropped from the ceiling and stained my shirt at first i thought it was bird poop but then i realized it was the air freshener then i couldn t turn on the light i told the lady at the counter that the lights didn t work and she rudely said i know you should surely take the time to do to the other starbucks on state st

this is not my favorite starbucks but i have gone here several times i do not really think the drink quality for most drinks is as impressive as other location in tucson and may it is because they are busy so often i feel like there is never a clean table inside or out overall it is an average starbucks and it will be a place i go just due to the location

very disappointed in this starbucks the service was good the drinks had very little flavor ordered a vanilla frap with a shot of expresso i ask if they put a shot in i think he was offended the next drink was a carmel frap with no whip same thing weak flavor and with whip my compliments to starbucks at th street they know how to make it

this location has reopened for business despite what yelp says on their site app just trying to get the word out as they were closed for a month starting during the pandemic i hope we can all return to a sense normalcy soon

very beautiful color would love to have used it but it was not enough hair for me i definitely thought that there would be enough with 5 bundles but they are not regular sized bundles you see in the hair store unfortunately i added a pic so you can determine if there is enough for your head before you buy would have loved to use it couldn't take it out of the package for further review because i need to return it

this place provides the standard starbucks high quality product served efficiently by pleasant barista staff i love the comfy outdoor couches weatherproof plastic of course that said i find the inside small and cramped with only high top seating except for a single lower table not welcoming atmosphere since the remodel necessitated by the closing of the bank branch with whom they shared a large lobby with confer station areas and work conference tables i go there on nice days and for drive through hate the interior

great drinks but the service here is so slow i have gone inside and through the drive thru and there s never any sense of urgency from the baristas i feel like they take their time and don t consider the customers they are serving it s just a bit frustrating when you re trying to get to work
a lot of seating cool upstairs spot for studying internet ing or south street people watching from the second floor i can sit here for days if i can find parking haha
if you are wearing for a night out this will be great pretty color but not suitable for all day wear

this light cream has a lovely not too heavy scent and smooths onto my skin quite easily there is no draggy feeling as with heavier creams and that is both a plus and a negative while i like this for daytime because it doesn't feel greasy it does not feel hydrating enough for night time at least not for my old skin i like that this product is made in the usa and that it is cruelty free although cruelty free claims need to be taken with a grain of salt br br the pump bottle works well and keeps air out of the product but there is no over cap or anything so this is best left on the counter putting it in a travel bag could cause a mess br br although i like this for a day cream i can't find that it contains any sun protection so if you are going to spend any time in the sun you'll need a separate product br br this seems a good product but in my opinion it is not outstanding doesn't really differentiate itself from dozens of other products in all price ranges

this is one of my favorite starbucks locations the staff is always friendly and the facility is always very clean they always get my order correct i spend quite a bit of time here studying for classes and promotions

it s a starbux so its the usual good quality coffee consistent i m here in the evening it s not crowded but steadily busy no waiting had a cranberry bliss bar that didn t seem to be quite as good i remembered not sure if it s my memory or it just wasn t as good but hey i like starbux this one is as good as others but no special hi how are ya s

soooo this place have gotten even more busy lately than usual i understand they re in a prime location but dude it s a tad ridiculous in here i rarely go stand in line anymore as the lines are crazy but it s pretty bad when i now have to put my mobile order in on the train about stops before i get to suburban then have to walk there and my order still isn t ready staff still friendly as always and this is why they get the stars and not i m just not sure how they can get their efficiency up they tried moving mobile orders to up front but recently put it back to having to ask for it it was awesome when i was able to come in and grab my drink and leave without having to wait to grab their attention anyway i still come here since it s directly in my building and it s convenient but i do think they need to figure out a way to handle the extra customers
the employees at this particular location are incredibly pleasant this is always my favorite starbucks to visit everyone is always in such a great mood kudos to them

went through the drive thru and ordered an iced macchiato when i got to the window i was handed a hot drink i am absolutely positive i asked for iced so they remade my drink which took forever and when i started to drink it it was like drinking water it was so gross i m pretty positive it was intentionally made crappy because they had to remake my drink

order was accurate and quick however the star war s soundtrack that they had going was so loud i could hear it through my headphones this is clearly not an isolated incident as there is a prior review that implied the music made it feel like a nightclub i was one of four working on things school work etc you know because it s a starbucks and usually it s a quiet environment with wifi where people can get work done however it took me four hours to get hours worth of work done you re paid to be there whereas we pay to be there so it may behoove you to be respectful of your patrons thanks

love this starbucks i think the manager i m not sure is always pleasant and makes sure customers and staff are wearing masks and he even wipes the door handles constantly and it gets super busy in there in the morning but service is always fast and pleasant

this is a great starbucks location with plenty of indoor and outdoor seating the new citrus green tea latte smells like a lemon drop and tastes like some lemon gummy is lost somewhere in the bottom of your cup it s not bad if you like that sort of thing they didn t skimp on the green tea it s got lots of great green tea flavor
great friendly staff and always good drinks and snacks my wife and i had a mocha this morning and i had an egg and sausage sandwich and my wife a chocolate croissant always great highly recommend
a little to tight to wear for long period of time

it was super busy i m here for a convention with my high school and it seemed like everyone in the hotel wanted something to drink the people were very friendly my drinks were out in no time and they were delicious i m a barista and i know how difficult it is in a rush would definitely go here again
ordered grande cafe americano and server poured me regular coffee from pre made bin guess i just should have ordered coffee and saved some

i recently ordered the la bella provinica coconut lime body care gift set however what i really wanted was the hand wash hand lotion caddy set in the coconut liime fragrance but it wasn't available therefore i chose the body care gift set i saw that the hand wash hand lotion were not in the care set and so i will be returning it please bring back the la bella provinica hand wash and hand lotion caddy and i will be happy with the french lavender fragrance i may even like this fragrance a little more just bring this set back please

this place is tiny i entered with a small compact stroller and it was difficult to maneuver around but it appeared clean and there was another room for patrons to sit the baristas were friendly and accommodating i asked for a grande to be split between kids cups and they had no problem doing so plus there was an extra bit in the grande cup that she gave to us as well thank you sidney yup totally ok with returning if i m in the area

i waited for twenty minutes at this starbucks for three drinks the workers had no sense of urgency i have never been more disappointed in a starbucks they spelled my name wrong waited an incredibly long time and they made my drink wrong i was too angry to ask to make my drink correctly because frankly i was worried it would take another twenty minutes i will for sure never come back to this location unless you wanna wait twenty minutes for a drink that s made incorrectly

visited this starbucks on veteran s day my best friend is a veteran and we thought we would go check their special for a free cup of coffee for veterans my friend went to order and asked about the veteran s day coffee a barista rudely said back to my friend um excuse me what are you even talking about there was a sign right in front of her about the special the barista then looks at the sign and says oh is today even veteran s day then asked for my friend s military id three individual times not a very nice way for my friend to spend her day disgusted by the way this barista treated my friend her name was tess refusing to come back to this location due to her behavior disgusted and ruined my friend s day

wow some of the most unengaged and self absorbed staff i ve ever seen at a starbucks in my life and that s been awhile they d rather play where am i going tonight than help someone looking for serious caffeine oh and that lack of attention shows in the bathroom facilities i mean beyond i ll tell you that my mochas were perfect though but i attribute that more to my suggestion of adding two mocha shots it almost made me wish they were automatons programmed to give a shit about the only customer in line waiting for someone to acknowledge them signed not all starbucks are the same

i have been going to this location for several years quality definitely down over last few months frequent out of stocks inside order delivery is a drawn out disjointed process today store had a dozen fruit flies in the cooler lots of regular flies in the store on a positive note employees seem courteous and friendly

while teatree oil and hemp each have a place in the edified and enlightened health practices of today i ve read and reread accompanying text and been unable to discover the purpose or best uses for which this roll on was designed additionally i had hoped that infusing the teatree oil with hemp might mitigate the distinctively strong smell of the teatree oil something that has always limited my use of teatree oil but that hope was unfulfilled and for olfactory purposes you should consider this strictly teatree oil consequently though i tried it i didn t feel as though it provided any specific benefit other than smelling like teatree oil if you consider that a benefit as a side note either my bottle was not properly sealed or there was a problem with packaging but approximately a quarter of my hemp infused teatree oil had leaked out during shopping and made for messy handling
this is a very good solvent with less alcohol smell which is good but so oily that's why i gave 3 stars the consistency is near to the dpg i wonder if it could be enhanced to be less oily

i am a permanent fixture in this starbucks my morning commute would be absolutely horrific if i did not stop here there is no drive thru here so i have no idea why there is a picture of one under this location the baristas here are excellent i come here so much that i don t even have to tell them what i want it s hilarious depending on the time you get here this location can have a line i came here on a saturday morning at am and actually left because they were so busy i felt violated like i own the place hahaahaha i come here all the time who are these strangers clogging up the place the service here is excellent but some days there is a long line most days i get in and out and there s no way to tell when you won t lose by coming here that s for sure

this is my go to starbucks when i have a lot of work to get done and need a good environment to work in compared to a couple other fishers starbucks locations this one is a little smaller in square feet but seating is more ample in my opinion i ve yet to have problems finding a spot to set up shop the staff is always super friendly and take the time to notice regulars i have never had a negative service experience at this location personally nor have seen anything negative with other patrons even considering i ve spent multiple days working in front of the counter for hours i m impressed coffee is coffee starbucks quality coffee across the board pro tip bring an extra layer if you get cold easily during the day and especially as the night goes on it can get pretty chilly inside which is nice on hot days

i am not starbucks prone preferring my coffee from either espresso art on university or coffee times on speedway but i cannot always get to the midtown area so this is where i end up sometimes i have had terrible experiences with starbucks in the past the coffee not the employees or the ambiance but the folks at this particular location know how to make an iced latte and the place is comfortable and likely because of its close proximity to pima community college and being that it is one of very few cafes on this side of town right off the interstate too it is often busy but it has a decent amount of seating even a few lounge chair sofas also nice floor to ceiling windows that are south facing make for a nice amount of natural light otherwise it s your standard starbucks they do sell little sandwiches and salads here the croissants are pretty good large and buttery as they should be the music is usually at a mellow volume and is starbucks typical jazz and neosoul lots of times and free wi fi that s always a strong draw

i was eager to receive this product since it is essentially the same as the sigma may but much more affordable however when i received the package i noticed right away there was some material stuck to the mat i tried picking it off with my nails soaking it in hot water wiping a cotton round soaked in rubbing alcohol and nothing removed whatever the white gray material is it s a little gross and i m concerned about using it to clean my brushes the smaller heart shaped silicone cleaner did not have anything stuck to it i tried the makeup sponge included in the product it picked up all my product but even soaked it did not blend product well it had a wicked strong chemical smell to it even though i had washed it first
cream is nice but not as effective in developing waves and curls that i have used in past would not order again
located in the middle of the delaware plaza it s usually incredibly crowded nonstop still they re efficient at keeping the line of travelers moving i ordered my chai latte it was was it was
tends to flake off

i guess i was not as impressed with this as others were it seems very lightweight and fragile when first taking it out my immediate instinct was to twist or pull off the bottom blue water tank there is a strange little warning sticker on the back that rules against this instructions also say not to do this but then mention cleaning the filter that is in the tank that you cannot remove i didn't like the little translucent rubber cap covering the charging port it is not attached to the unit and is sure to get lost the rubber 34 o 34 ring on the tank fill door and the door itself seem poised to fall apart the unit does however function as it is intended the stream on the high setting is pretty powerful also good for getting the cat off the table the tank lasts about 30 seconds and there is water everywhere make sure you use warm water if you have sensitive teeth shooting cold water at you gum line can be pretty uncomfortable so i will probably use this till it breaks or looks too dirty to clean but i think for my next one i will try a waterpik brand
visited here on at pm jessica took our order i will cut this short and simply day that jessica was not only curt and short with us she was rude

i think it s hard to review chain restaurants like starbucks because they have so many company specific standards to meet that you really should have a similar experience there no matter what location you go to my visit to this location was exactly like any other starbucks i ve been to except for the wifi i was greeted when i walked in the baristas were friendly i got my drink quickly and i was very happy with my chai tea late however i planned on spending a couple hours at starbucks i had a lot of school work to do and i drove several miles from my house to come to this location but it totally wasn t worth the trip because the wifi was incredibly slow when i was watching my lectures they kept stopping and needing to buffer every minutes i ve never had this problem anywhere else the slow wifi was so annoying that i left early and went down the street to corner bakery cafe where i was able to watch my lectures without a single problem definitely won t be coming back to this starbucks to study again
the heavy set lady with the dreads is very rude to customers and dirty she gave me a attitude because i asked what the bathroom code was i ll never go back here
super friendly staff don t really do starbucks too often but i will be sure to come back to this one ordered a venti passiontango iced tea with a bacon gouda egg sandwich everything was super yummy

my boyfriend and i stopped by this starbucks location on saturday evening it was pretty busy but we found a table near the door we could sit at i ordered a chamomille tea whie he ordered a passion tea lemonade we sat down and waited patiently for our drinks to arrive after over minutes of waiting i decided to go up to the barista counter to see if our drinks were there nothing so i walked back up to the girl who took our order and she said pointed at three paper bags with pastries in them and said my order was there i was confused but she was busy with a customer so i waited until she was done with the customer and asked her where our order was she snapped back that they d be waiting at the barista counter so i walked back to the counter again to make sure i didn t miss it and still nothing was there i was getting annoyed by now meanwhile both girls working the barista machine couldn t be bothered to even look up to see why i was walking back and forth looking frustrated i walked back to the girl at the register and told her our drinks were there nor were they called out she asked me what we ordered again rolled her eyes and yelled at another girl behind the counter to make the passion tea lemonade so i walked back to the barista side and waited for the drinks the passion tea lemonade wasn t even shaken like it was supposed to be all she did was pour the pre made mix from the carton over a glass of ice and roughly put it on the counter so i took it annoyed and brought it over to my boyfriend no sooner had i sat down that i heard the girl at the register call out that my chamomille tea was ready so i walked back again and shehad placed it on the higher ledge vs the lower one where the barista girls put them as i brought it down i ended up spilling the tea all over my hand since it was so high i was sooooo mad why did she put it up there in the first place i was able to finally put a lid on it and walk back to the table where my boyfriend immediately asked me what happened he felt so bad he used his cold iced drink to relieve the pain and throbbing from my hand this incidence was the second starbucks in the city i ve had horrible service from i am beyond done with this chain their sister chain teavana is way better in terms of customer service and product quality i will never visit this store again
the 34 mermaid 34 isn't very distinct but otherwise the bag is reasonably well made

the staff here is super chill it gets a little snug in here when it s busy which can be overwhelming but besides that i ve never had a problem i also like starbucks because they carry a few gluten free snacks like blueberry granola yum and some other things it s a little pricey but worth it every once in awhile
not accepting walking customers employees might be working only by the hour and don t care about company business
good set but case is difficult to open as it was a bit bent when we received it not worth the trouble to return
wasn't very impressed with this product had to reapply throughout the day to keep hair in place and seemed to apply unevenly for me

kudos to this starbucks for having a back bone some unpleasant woman named precious came in with some stupid looking man demanding that their drinks be remade however the drinks were not from that day starbucks apparently has a same day same store policy which the baristas rightly enforced when the baristas informed them of the policy they got very rude and demanding the guy that was with her dropped the f bomb and demanded to speak with a manager they almost became threatening these two were clearly scammers precious j and whoever that guy was i hope you both get trespassed and never come back bye
yum what a good starbucks they make good drinks and are friendly good seating and service

went into this starbucks with my mom on the way to mccall and the guy at the counter was so rude my mom didn t know what she wanted and he kept rolling his eyes and we were the only people in the entire store

this starbucks in horsham is staffed by friendly baristas who aim to please and you do not get too much of the upsell dont you want something to eat today schtick the drive through window is convenient but it is a pain to get in and outof the parking lot due to the traffic nothing special but nothing wrong with this location

i know it s late and everyone has a bad day every once in a while today was a roughy day for me which is probably why the cashier s bad attitude stuck out even more but given the fact that my latte was decent and showing a little mercy by assuming that the cashier isn t extremely disconnected and dry everyday i ll spare this starbucks stars
not as easy to use as it looks
i ordered it because it reminded me of my mom

poor customer service the screen where you can review your order is often not working and if you try to correct the order at the window they seem annoyed i ordered a cold brew with cream and at the window it had no cream so i politely asked that they add cream i watched as the barista proceeded to pour out half the coffee and add cream to the point where my cold brew was completely undrinkable this has happened on multiple occasions they will also sometimes offer a cup of cream on the side and if i refuse because i cannot mix my drink while i m driving they dump out half the coffee and add an unreasonable amount of cream i have worked in customer service for years and as a bartender and it is not difficult to correct a simple mistake on this occasion they were not even busy

i live and work around several starbucks and although it may be slightly out of my way at the time i will always come to the starbucks on calgary trail bren the barista is an absolute treat i feel working at a coffee shop you need to be in a positive mood dealing with grumpy bears before their morning coffee and bren really sets the bar he takes the time to get to know you and always calls me friend which i find makes it more personal haha my coffee is always done proper and in a timely manner not an overly busy coffee shop either so to sit down and get work done isn t much of an issue
i m allergic to dairy they didn t have my first non dairy option so i chose another they still have me milk this place is a lawsuit waiting to happen

this starbucks seems like an older location there is no drive through and electrical outlets are in short supply either the seating arrangement keeps you away from the outlets or they re just not there there was only one outlet near the three tables i was sitting at but it s still starbucks quality drinks friendly staff and good service it s always a pleasant atmosphere and great for a little mid day break
efficient but busy parking is tough it s full of college kids due to proximity with vanderbilt

i love this starbucks the employees are amazing they are so cheerful and fun so early in the morning they always make me smile and feel good when i get my daily coffee i have a starbucks right next to my house but always come to this one because the staff is so amazing
the one i like best is the toothbrush looking one i use it around my nose and other tight spots on my face it is effective for cleaning pores the others are just ok
these are much smaller then i expected but are very cute

wore them for 10 hrs no lifting at all used the liner in the tube easy to apply dries shiny hard to tell when it s dry applied 2 thin coats with at least 5 min dry time between did my hair and brows in between i had to cut the extra plastic off both ends or plastic would have poked me i tried it but very painful not as comfortable as invisible or cloth bands but more durable and longer lasting i wear contacts and they did turn my eyes red for about 3 hrs and then i completely forgot i had them on br glue removal tried oil based eye makeup removes didn t work lots of rubbing ultimately used my lancome eye make up remover which made the process quick br nice for the price but not a go to lash for me

my favorite starbucks i ve been to so far in philly everyone is always friendly and most importantly it s always fast no matter how many people are crowded in here they know how to be absolutely efficient and i appreciate it so much

i know i know everyone thinks it s cool to hate starbucks because they re a big fat corporate target but i d rank this store way above any indy shop any day i ve tried most of them in town and they ve got nothing on starbucks s quality or service

this starbucks sucks butt i ll give it to them because they are very friendly they are constantly messing up my drink order butt they offer to fix it with no problem they are also pretty slow don t ever go in when they have a long line

at first i thought this was the greatest razor ever it provides a smooth shave probably the best shave i've ever encountered i have very sensitive skin so i have to be selective first impressions it is a very sleek and cool looking razor it is so fancy that i am afraid of breaking it every time i touch it the problem with this razor is not its performance rather it is the maintenance the lotion is expensive and to make things worse it is nearly impossible to find unless you are willing to spend lots of money and buy it online but the razor works so i stuck it out br br next problem norelco suggests that you replace the cartridge for sanitary reasons each time you refill the lotion ok but when i ordered the lotion which is supposed to come with the cartridge there was no cartridge so i decided to stick it out anyway each time i replaced the lotion i would just remove the cartridge and clean it myself that seemed fine until this morning when i accidentally broke a piece of this fragile cartridge now i can't get the lotion to come out so the razor is ineffective i tried to buy a new lotion with cartridge at target and the lotion came without the cartridge so i have to return it br br i know phillips norelco has excellent customer service so i called to see if they could help me it turns out that the lotion does not always come with the cartridge although it is advertised that way and i was told that it came with the cartridge by a customer service rep before i bought the razor so it's kind of like a little guessing game where can i find the lotion and cartridge together fun i asked if they could just send me some cartridges no lotion just cartridges and i'd be happy but they could not do that so i am going to return this razor and get my money back br br i still have a previous norelco shaver dry and i will try that again although it is not as good i think in the end i may have to resort back to the painful manual razor shave i have been a norelco customer for many years and up to this point i was always very pleased this is disappointing br br to summarize this is an excellent razor but it is not worth the money or the hassle you have to go through to make it work effectively br br i welcome any shaving advice to help my sensitive skin

located on the intersection at magazine and washington is this great starbucks location being on the intersection there are plenty of parking options available through out your visit there the line is always people long no matter what time i go but they usually manage to go through it pretty quickly which is nice on my last visit i wanted to try the gingerbread latte and i had a free birthday drink so when i placed my order i requested both of those the woman who took my order okayed it and along i went i paid with a different guy who ended up charging me for the drink which was supposed to free i explained that i told the other woman it was meant to be the free birthday special but he just laughed and said you have to tell me not her well she s the one that took my order so she should ve been the one to put me through the register too so that was annoying they just had no communication between the staff members and how he shrugged it off was irritating anyways i got my gingerbread latte and took a seat now this place is always busy so don t expect your ideal seating if you come too late in the day i ended up moving three times as new more preferred places to sit became available the downside to the seating is that there aren t many powerpoint available and starbucks has to know that people come to work here while they drink their coffee not a clever move the gingerbread latte was just okay it didn t taste like gingerbread at all so i was pretty disappointed but i managed to finish it off despite the lack of taste there is a wide variety of seating inside with wall seating tabled seating and a few couch seating which is nice there is also outdoor seating but during this weather it isn t recommended but would give you views of the street which is a nice distraction from the hustle and bustle from inside overall a beautiful location but the lack of communication and consideration the staff have between themselves and the customers made the visit spoiled

behind the location at the cheshire inn on western side of forest park this is probably the most unique starbucks in st louis service is quick the staff are personable even when slammed under the morning rush and the atmosphere is a little less corporate in feel there s little mistaking that you re in a starbucks when you step in the door but it s also distinctly the central west end starbucks skim the reviews or google maps and you ll find just about all that you need to know for a great visit to this walkable store there s no dedicated parking lot or pickup spot but there a few sturdier places to lock up a bike on the block drivers do have options though there s a public garage above the schlafly library on euclid and metered parking along the street free street parking is often available to the east of the shop on maryland ave and there s a paid parking lot across the street too there s no drive thru but mobile orders are usually accepted the location isn t that large but does have a good mix of semi communal seating small tables sidewalk seating and a couple of more comfortable chairs if there s really any complaint with the store it s the minor irritation of its tendency to sell out of products whether it s blonde roast breakfast sandwiches or nitro cold brew each of which have been unavailable at least once during my random stops in over the past year i ve never had that affect an app order but if you have your mind set on a particular item it s probably best to order ahead

i had been using high molecular weight ha for a couple of weeks on my face hair with nice moisturizing results but at some point i read on beauty blogs and publications that since low molecular weight ha is better absorbed through the skin that it was a much better option for the face made sense to me because of this i bought a lmw ha serum to put on my skin this serum felt differently watery yet more drying that the hmw ha hmw can initially feel a bit drying on the skin my face also felt irritated i have acne prone skin after the first days of using it i still decided to buy this powder and the results very similar to the serum i bought br br so i decided to do some research on the difference between both the hmw and the lmw because i could not understand why the lmw which is supposed to be a far better option for the skin according to the beauty industry did not give me the good results i have with the hmw interestingly enough i found this 34 transepidermal water loss increased by 55 5 with low molecular weight and was reduced by 28 with crosslinked resilient and by 16 with hmw 34 so more water loss with lmw not good br br i also noted this 34 there is abundant experimental evidence from the human physiology and biochemistry literature to support the basic notion that lmw ha is inflammatory pro fibrotic and associated with adult scarring phenotypes rather than fetus like scar free truly regenerative healing the latter is what we want in an any aesthetic procedure or topical adjunct to a procedure or just for topical use 34 this part here may explain why my face felt irritated and even got a mild breakout after using the lmw ha more info on this on barefacedtruth they have detailed explanation and comments on this br br i did give this product a 3 star because it is nicely packaged has the detailed info on the product etc 2 stars down for being marketed as a potent moisturizer

since there aren t any reviews for this product i thought i would write one for those who aren t familiar with the brand or the item i m now 66 years old and have been using only la prairie products for my face since 2009 10 my face looks better than ever because of it this item in particular is a very gentle easy to apply and use facial cleanser that doesn t require any water or actual washing process it goes on a cotton pad not the balls and not too much either and you gently wipe your face and eye lids going in a circular motion and always apply outwards and upwards this will help your skin from being pulled down which can cause more wrinkles the company has changed the exact name of the product but it s the same only an improved version as it always has been for me i use this as the first step in my nightly facial ritual which is to cleanse the face i follow with other products in stages finishing up with the moisturizer one for the face and a different one for the eyes my rating of this being sold online is hard since it s a wonderful product however it s outrageously overpriced for what s a trial size and free gift given out with purchases of a full size la prairie item depending on how much you spend and where you buy it might be just one of multiple free trial size items the full size of this item is about 100 usd and it s around 8 ounces the bottle is probably 8 high and a couple inches wide at least so part of my rating is based on the product itself and the other part is on the price for this size another thing i want to mention is that i have sensitive skin and have never had any issues with this product line you re face will thank you

i have been waiting several years for a starbucks to open in this location right on the corner of terrace road and avenue so i waited a while after it finally did to post my review now first off i do love starbucks but i am not one of those customers who are in there every day or necessarily even every week and i am not happy with every starbucks i go to especially drive thrus as i am one of those people who never get their coffee the way the recipe is made that is one of the reasons i like starbucks it is never a problem to ge my drink customized i find that most of their coffee drinks are too sweet for my taste so usually get them half sweet and often have to customize the milk due to dietary concerns and due to chronic migraines doctors orders have to have decalf now i have never had a problem with any of these customizations when i have gone in to a starbucks however drive thrus can be another story speaking of customizations their grande hot chocolates have pumps mocha pump vanilla try it with pumps mocha and pumps vanilla it s good everyone i have suggested try it agrees this starbucks has been open for a few months now and i am very happy to say that each time i have been in the service has been great i have been in at different times of day but not early morning yet they have been not so busy to very busy when i have been there and the staff have always been pleasant this is something to say as many of them are new to starbucks every time i have gone in i was happy to see that they are getting busier and busier as this means i hope they will be around for a good while to come i was disappointed that they have extremely limited equipment for sale as i was looking for a burr grinder and they did not have any but this was probably due to the fact that they are so new and have not established any retail sales yet

braun's competitively priced electric powered toothbrushes are very good values and reliable performers most models use the same rotating type replacement toothbrush heads br br the advance power 4500px bright d4510 like most electric toothbrushes that use aa batteries delivers significantly lower brushing torque than a toothbrush with a built in rechargeable battery such as braun's vitality model the vitality may cost a little more but it delivers a lot more brushing power and the high capacity battery allows for many uses between recharges br br both braun models will do a good job however the faster more powerful vitality will probably get more done in the same amount of time given the small price differential and long life rechargeable battery the vitality would seem to be a much better value those who prefer a more gentle brushing action can go with the 4500px or any of the multitude of aa battery powered toothbrushes available

the name honey bee smooth bath body scrub moisturizer just evokes good thoughts doesn t it if you love honey it just sounds amazing i know i love honey and i love using it or having it in my beauty products so i was looking forward to receiving this product to test it out br br there are some actual product packaging concerns that really should be addressed by the company that makes this body scrub first off the jar is pretty sturdy i m not going to dispute that and it s amber which is always good in helping keep out uv rays the only seal is the amazon barcode label one of the photos shows the label but i cut through it it was intact when it arrived so that was not the issue there was no shrink wrap seal neither was there an inner seal nor one of those inner lid liners this jar also does not have any other labeling except for that amazon barcode and the top label with their website url this was a standalone jar no box there is no product information on the jar no ingredient list no product name no manufacture or expiration dates this brings up heavy red flags for me quality control especially br br the product description sounds rather amazing right ok keep in mind what i previously mentioned about quality control in their description they advertise that you can eat it i d recommend against it because of the lack of quality sealing it would be one thing if this were given to me by someone who i knew personally that had made the product but since this is coming from a company that i don t know and that doesn t have anything other than the description on amazon i m not sticking this product in my mouth i know the anti bacterial properties of honey however that doesn t mean that it can t be contaminated by anything else 1 it s not pure honey there are other ingredients within 2 who knows the health sanitation practices of this company right 3 with there just being the barcode label as a seal who s to say that someone couldn t have tampered with it in the warehouse and 4 their only label the one i mentioned with their website url if you go to the url it comes up with br br this webpage is not available br br err_name_not_resolved br br i don t know about you but without anything reputable to back up the product or company i find it very hard for me to trust this br br all of that aside if you can look past those packaging and trust issues getting to the actual product br br when you open the cover it does have that very rich strong scent of honey the brown sugar and other ingredients have settled to the bottom so some stirring was necessary the honey is also pretty solid so a cosmetic spatula not included was not adequate enough to stir it once you do stir it the scent of the brown sugar comes through because it s honey it s really sticky and like any sugar scrub it has that gritty sugar texture which is great for exfoliation if your skin is dry when you apply you may have a tough time spreading it to avoid this moisten your skin prior to smoothing this along br br it does its job at exfoliating removing a layer of dead skin but i didn t expect that it wouldn t the product itself is good leaves the skin smooth and smells good i used it on my leg br br it s not proprietary though since there are a ton of diy tutorials on how to make sugar scrubs out on the web nowadays but if you re not into making your own and if they change the packaging and labeling and get a working website up then this would be the way to go br br i really hope that they get the concerns i mentioned in the beginning straightened out it would have been a decent product all around if not for those issues if they do then i'd be more than happy to bump the rating to a 4 this product was given to me complimentary in exchange for an honest and unbiased review

this is a potentially excellent product if you don't need it to be completely stable it wiggles some though if you put your weight directly over the leg and push straight up it's fine just don't expect it to be rock solid i have a regular grab bar on the right side and use the left support rail only and that's fine because the two rails are not directly connected so you can use one rail or both but as a big guy 230 lbs i'd be nervous if i didn't have the grab bar even though it's rated for 300 lbs it would be perfect for a smaller person who just needs a boost but it could be potentially dangerous if a larger person with serious balance problems fell sideways br br note too that this will not work with a 1 piece toilet that curves upward from seat to tank the connector piece needs about 2 inches of flat space behind the seat br br pros sturdy aluminum tube construction designed to bear weight directly over the support easy to put together with a screwdriver and maybe a pliers depending on your toilet seat hardware adjustable for height and width br br cons works only with a traditional toilet wiggles to the left and right adjusting width and height might be difficult or impossible for a person with poor hand strength the spring loaded buttons are stiff made in china but what isn't these days

if you are looking for the perfect combination of coffee drinks and people watching then this is the place for you with the perfect location in new hope there is never a dull moment with the hustle and bustle of this wonderfully populated town the location is perfect for people watching but the parking can be tricky on busy days such as the weekends all meters are taken and it may take a few trips around to find a spot the starbuck s is a hidden gem among all the other glammed and obvious shops throughout new hope the simplicity of the brick is important with the pleasant porch that has chairs and tables sets the mood even before a customer sets foot in the shop the interior of this starbucks is very neat and tidy with a relaxing feel if staying a long time do not fear the bathrooms are very clean but only have one bathroom for each sex which can become inconvenient if a line forms as it is such a prime location many customers are only to be expected at certain times such as weekends there are lines that are not the most convenient when waiting for your delicious beverage the beverages and snacks to go with are very good do not be afraid if you have a special request the workers are very friendly and appreciate good clientele as much as you appreciate good workers walking in the large doors you will be engulfed in the delicious smell of different coffees after getting your drink and scone you can choose to go to the inside seating where there are both seats with tables as well as comfy arm chairs to sit back and relax while sipping your drink on a nice day i recommend sitting outside and enjoying the town from one of the tables on the outside porch this starbucks is best for the atmosphere the town itself brings i assume everyone knows the basics of starbucks from the different options of drinks to tall grande and venti size since starbucks is a chain coffee store i would say the one in new hope is best for its surroundings and the feel of the place

while i don t have any problem reviewing chain establishments with only an exception or two i don t tend to review places where you can pretty much expect the same thing from location to location this is for the most part the truth with starbucks starbucks is starbucks ya know if you don t like their coffee in one location there s a pretty good chance you won t like it in another location and of course vice versa now then you do get some variations in service and i do think those are worth mentioning so here i am i was spending the evening at this corner of th illinois dinner at byrne s grilled pizza a visit to kids ink ice cream at graeter s and at the last minute a stop at this starbucks location for a shaken iced tea for the road i mean heck even the fire station in this neighborhood is pretty good to look at as has been noted this location is located on the corner and it s in an older fairly upscale neighborhood while not all the buildings in this area are wheelchair friendly starbucks built a decent ramp into their place and despite it being an incredibly small location it s also pretty well laid out for a wheelchair i was actually wheeling by starbucks when an employee appeared at the door as i haven t known them to be incredibly hard sell with their coffee it quickly became apparent he believed i was on the way in and because it was raining and a bit chilly he was there to make sure i got in alright great move starbucks there s actually an entrance right on illinois and an entrance on the th street side the illinois street entrance while appearing to be the main entrance isn t adjacent to the ordering side it s not a huge deal but worth noting as i entered another friendly employee poked gentle fun of my gold club card and the fact that i corrected myself when i referred to my drink as merely an iced tea and not a shaken iced tea she was like i d have known what you meant i almost said yeah well i ve heard starbucks can be kind of militant about the whole drink name thing but i decided to appreciate her friendly demeanor my drink was prepared quickly and correctly the same employee who d opened the door on my way in opened it on the way out while this isn t particularly rare for someone in a wheelchair it still was a notch above on a night when it was raining it was appreciated as others have noted the interior is small and i could see where it would easily fill up this location is fairly close to butler university though i d imagine butler has their own options and i can think of other starbucks locations also close to butler along with a hubbard cravens this place fits the neighborhood feel of this corner they were warm friendly and inviting and their interior reflects their upscale area because you do have some coffee options you may not find in the more urban settings

my first impression of the razor was that it was overly packaged in a day and age in which we're becoming aware of environmental hazards i don't think there's a need for an outer box enclosing a couple layers of thick hard to open plastic wrapping a strong pair of scissors cut through the lot and eventually i got to the razor itself br br i was pleased to see that it comes with a hard shell case for travel this is definitely a good thing to have though i would have preferred it were only one piece that swivels open and shut rather than two pieces that have to be separated to open it br br the instructions indicate that the charging pod should be unplugged when the razor is fully charged which takes about an hour while hardly the worst thing in the world i don't see why they couldn't have designed it so that it could remain plugged it but turned off in general i prefer not to have plugs lying around exposed especially in the bathroom where i think most people would tend to keep it it does have a very clear indicator though telling how much longer it needs to charge before reaching the full 65 minutes and after a couple weeks of usage it still did not need to be recharged so it definitely holds the charge well br br the razor itself is stylish and comfortable to hold and it has a trimmer on the back which is good for sideburns and the awkward just under the nostrils area br br my first shave felt like it took ages and half way through i seriously considered giving up and getting out my old blade and shaving cream i decided to stick with it and eventually i figured out that you can't just press it to your face but press it rather firmly with more pressure it eventually got the job done subsequent shaves went much easier and as i got used to using the shaver the shave time got less and less it does a significantly better and faster job on only one day's growth rather than two or three so it's much more ideal for everyday use than if you tend to go a few days between shaves br br clean up is easy and fast just flip the three razor bits up and rinse with hot water i'm a little suspicous about using water to clean it each day i would tend to think it'll rust but time will tell br br after shaving my face sometimes feels less comfortable than had i used a regular blade and shaving cream but usually it feels all right this is the third electric shaver i've owned and it has been the case with all three that the shave is not as close as even the worst blade i've used there's really no getting around it you'll always get a closer shave using a real blade i'd say this is easily the best of the three electric razors i've used though and did a significantly better job on the chin due to its swiveling head br br overall i find myself liking this shaver particularly for the traveling and the cold winter months when i don't really want to deal with a wet shave in the morning

provides a decent shave particularly after the beard has been moistened as it is immediately after a shower the question is for how long considering the flimsy construction of some components and the already below specified battery life br br things they don't describe in the mostly worthless manual br br the charging indicator is a steady red ac plug symbol br br the lcd indication at full charge is 99 a red not a far more intuitive green battery full symbol is shown at when the charge reaches 99 br br a low battery is indicated by a flashing red ac plug symbol when the charge number on the lcd reaches 10 br br charge time was tested and found to be 82 minutes the manual claims 60 to 90 minutes so they got that right br br use time is specified in the manual as 50 to 60 minutes the run time was tested and found to be only 30 minutes in 5 minute on five minute off intervals just free running and not being used to shave which should further reduce the run time slightly br br the charge indicator was at 52 after 25 minutes and then rapidly dropped from that to 10 only five minutes later causing the low battery indicator to flash so i would definitely not trust the charge indicator to be an accurate indication of how much shaving time you have left they are apparently not calculating percent charge remaining and displaying it on the lcd they are simply and far less usefully displaying percent battery voltage which drops off rapidly at what is called the battery's discharge knee a cheap route to take revealing that the lcd display is nothing more useful than a gimmick br br the manual states that the razor should be unplugged from the charger this razor package does not come with an ac to usb charge adapter when the charge number reaches 99 so i suspect this charger might not have an intelligent charger which stops the battery charge process at full charge to avoid battery damage over the long term so i will not put this razor on charge and just forget about it until my next shave like i can with my norelco with its intelligent charge system br br other information br br the space under the heads which catches the beard shavings is very small cleaning often will be a must we'll see how the hinge and head locking mechanism hold up br br when opening the shaving head to clean put a finger on it to slow its opening otherwise it will rapidly flip open and if a razor element isn't locked into its place by its flimsy and not very intuitive to correctly replace locking ring as it wasn't in my case the razor element and its parts will be vigorously projected into an alternate universe luckily i found all of the parts had i been standing over a sink some could easily have gone down the drain we'll see how the razor element locking rings hold up

so i bought this set because i had a very big project that could only get cleaned by using a product like these the project was to clean all this nasty glue and dirt off of the floor pictured in the included images there is a before and after image for those who want to know how much i asked of this product and while the razors themselves are very good quality and last a decent amount of time per razor the actual razor holder is what i ran into major problems with even when i bought a more professional one at my local hardware store now while my project was unique i would have to personally say that if you have something less intensive than what i did you should not really run into many problems i completed the clean by cleaning the tool and razor after each and every tile that was scraped making sure that no moisture stayed on the device or blade as that is what mainly cause the issues however i did have to eventually go out and buy a more rugged blade holder as the mechanical part to remove the blades and to slide the blade in and out of it malfunctioned quite often and eventually both broke only 1 razor blade actually ever broke which means that i still think that getting so many decent blades at this price made it worth it even though the tools broke i hope that these images and my experience can help any potential customers to know about benefits and problems of this product and again i would overall recommend it

today is supposed to be my day for returning phone calls and emails and lots of paperwork but horror of horrors i ve been on the road so much that i completely forgot to check the status of the pantry for green tea before i started boiling the water this morning fearing a bad case of the shakes from early morning tea withdrawal i grabbed my car keys and headed down the road to starbucks this particular starbucks sits on the corner of dale mabry and linebaugh avenue within walking distance of my condo when i first moved to carrollwood the space was occupied by a skanky long john silvers which thankfully closed was gutted by the developer and re opened as a really nice starbucks the interior looks less like an industrial strength coffee house and more like a very comfortable study reading room with lots of places to sit and relax i m not a big fan of coffee and especially not the jumbo grande mocha frappacino double shot espresso salted caramel latte crap that most people seem to like instead i just wanted a basic cup of freshly brewed green tea oh and one of those yummy looking blueberry scones as well please the barrista seemed to appreciate my needs perhaps it was the dark circles under my eyes and the way i was chewing on my lower lip and she quickly rushed to pour me a large green tea and fork over the scone sighs happily the tea was flavorful and calming and the scone was fresh and delicious i found a corner table and sat down to read the front section of the tampa bay times while watching the other harried morning commuters lining up for their fresh shot o joe before starting their work day this particular starbucks opens at in the morning and stays open till or so at night they have a drive through window which seems popular with the vapid latte crowd who are too busy blabbing away on their cellphones to come into the store fine by me like ya know well done starbucks and thanks for saving my day

thank you in advance to the amazon vine program for providing an item to review a positive review was not required nor was it requested and all words are my own br br getting my nails done is not just a relaxing experience but it is also an expressive creative one br br seeing this colorful and glittery set i had to get it br br i don t know about others experiences mine did not come with a brush or applicator for the little gel pots i remembered what my nail techs used to use small make up brushes and thankfully i had some that seemed to work br br the black polish is necessary to get the desired effect i chose the purple glitter gel and after a few awkward moments i got a pretty decent manicure more of the black showed through there were moments when the purple glitter reflected but it wasn t what i thought br br i haven t tried the other colors but this is fairly decent and easy to use not my favorite as there are other brands out there that are even easier to use br br overall i m not too unhappy with it it s not something i would likely purchase again

i generally try to stay away from coffee chains since there are so many local places in town but starbucks always has a good tea selection which i appreciate i don t drink coffee it s starbucks i m sure you re familiar with the prices affordable if you get a house coffee or tea a little pricey if you get something a little more frilly for not drinking coffee i spend a lot of time in coffee shops doing freelance graphic design work or looking for a quiet spot to read i m always trying to find the right mix of cozy and quiet but with large windows for natural light this starbucks does the trick it s small but since it s off the beaten path a bit generally not too full however it s never empty if i wanted to be alone i d stay home the baristas are always friendly and it s clean there s one long talk table in the middle if you want more of a community atmosphere or room to spread out and smaller tables next to the windows there s also outdoor seating in the normal months located across the street from walmart and goodyear it s a great place to work after running errands or while waiting for an oil change

this has become my fave as far as starbucks locations are concerned it s in our neighborhood and i didn t realize how convenient the drive thru service is during the early morning commute until just recently i ve been coming here more for their tea lattes why because i make my own coffee at home and i like it better i d rather get something that i don t make well besides that i m more into the aromatic tea lattes during the holiday season it s so comforting and calming i ve actually had a nicer commute this week because of it my recent finds are the hot matcha green tea and the london fog tea lattes you won t find the london fog tea latte on the store menu but you ll see it on their website it s aromatherapy in a cup or it is for me they have other tea lattes but this one is my favorite the grande size has teavana earl grey tea bags steeped in warm milk they put something else in there to sweeten it maybe some cinnamon syrup but i m not quite sure all i know is that it s my new favorite hot beverage from starbucks i m also a huge fan of their matcha green tea i don t know what kind they use but ground matcha leaves are typically full of good antioxidants it contains that as well as some sweeteners so maybe not as healthy as one you would make at home but the taste is all there you can make it as healthy as you want it to be with non fat milk and no sweetener anyway i like the service at this location i also come here for the mini vanilla bean scones they are small enough and easily satisfy my sugar craving when needed i ve never been a big fan of their espresso it has always been hot or miss for me i just don t like that burnt coffee bean taste the espresso blends branded as blonde have been less bitter other than that this place is a winner for me

edited review as of 9 25 21 br br i came back to edit this review and to lower my rating from 4 stars to 3 stars here's why br br after a few weeks of using this cream i started to develop some sensitivity to it when i say sensitivity here's what i mean 1 the scent bothered me more than it did when i first used the cream in fact i started to sneeze most evening after applying it 2 i'd used the cream on other areas of my face and noticed minor breakouts in those areas br br basically i think the cream was just too oily for my skin even around the eye area which has virtually no oil glands the non absorbency of the cream left me feeling sticky and greasy even though i gave the cream plenty of time to absorb br br end of edit br br br br everything else i said in my original review still stands but the above edit may help you decide if this is the right eye cream for you br br if you're looking for a natural plant based eye cream that is ultra thick and rich you'll find the cream on a couple of hours before bed since it takes quite a while to absorb into the skin if you don't wait you'll end up depositing most of the cream on your pillowcase br br i've also used a small amount of this cream on other areas of my face nose to mouth lines and the results were the same as around my eye area br br so what were the results the skin around my eye area looked smoother and brighter after one night of use br the results on other parts of my face were less noticeable but i believe continued use of the cream will improve the results in both the eye area and on the face br br i'm rating the cream 4 stars instead of 5 because of one major issue i have with it which is the scent br the cream has a rather strong minty menthol medicinal smell that takes some time to fade enjoy using this one

update this is my second time buying these braids and as much as i love how easy they are to install goodness do they shed instantly tons of shedding from the ends all the way up when i trim off loose pieces very carefully it seems to create a million more i sleep with them in a satin scarf and don't mess with them very much they just have a frizzy life of their own as much as i love the color i'm going to try a different color and maybe a different brand in the future br br this was my first time self installing braids already braided as a mixed afro indigenous person who didn't grow up having my hair braided and has struggled to find a method of doing it that won't give me a migraine for days last time these were such a gift br br super easy install it still took several hours but i'm new to this so i expected that my 2c 3b hair is very short and fine see photo so i did a mixture of rubber bands and tiny braids to crochet into with murray's edgewax to separate and got to be ultra glued to hold it thank you many youtube tutorials br br i've had so many compliments on them and a lot of surprise when i share they were pre braided and self intalled compared to my last braids these are lightweight and soft although the blonder ends are a bit rough i did an apple cider vin warm water soak gentle shampoo and a deep conditioner warm water soak followed by a very thorough rinse then i hung them to dry from their gold bands for several days before i installed them i still have two packs left over and have a big head br br i'm honestly so happy with them and glad i did them myself one day i would really love to have my hair braided professionally but this is an amazing option for myself

br br wow it looks like i'm part of a small minority here i'm happy that this product works for all the 5 and 4 star reviewers for me meh br br for starters this feels greasy on my skin and takes longer than other moisturizers to absorb certainly it is an 34 okay 34 moisturizer hence the three stars 34 it's okay 34 but for me it's sure nothing to write home about br br i very much like the flip top tube very quick and easy to open and dispense with one hand the texture is nice and i do appreciate the absence of scent but an hour after i've applied it my face feels no different than iti did before i put it on br br having said that i will say that i have researched the use and effects of ceramide on skin and it does seem that in certain strengths and when used with certain other ingredients ceremides can help skin retain moisture so this product will work for some people it just doesn't do much for me br br this product is not overly expensive which helps but there are a number of lower priced moisturizers that i believe most people would find just as good as or perhaps better than this one i can't recommend it as a great moisturizer and i honestly don't know how it gets such terrific views but that's the nature of skin care what works for some doesn't work for others i just can't see this one as being any kind of a magic bullet
