i'm puzzled by this product i loved the idea of having a natural non toxic nail polish remover i paint my own nails quite often skipping the nail salon to save money and time i've been giving myself manicures and pedicures since 6th grade so i'm pretty good at it if i do say so myself and am well versed in many of the products out there i typically use a 100 acetone remover which is awesome but i hate that there are so many harmful chemicals not only on my nails but also in the fumes i'm breathing in every time i use it so when i saw this product i was excited and motivated to try it and like it br br when it arrived i was also pleased with the size i had assumed it would be pretty small because of the way the dropper looks next to it in the picture but it's actually a good sized bottle before using any product i read the directions and particularly with a new type of product like this non toxic all natural nail polish remover that's when i saw that you have to leave the product on the nail for 2 5 minutes i don't understand this because once you use the dropper to apply the product to the nail polish that's on the nail it immediately starts dripping down the sides of the nails onto your hands and makes a bit of a mess it's also pretty inconvenient to sit there for 5 minutes when i could use my regular nail polish remover and would have clean nails in 30 seconds to a minute i decided instead to try pouring the product into a shallow bowl and soaking my nails in it instead this did make it much easier and created less of a mess but it also requires you to use a lot more of the product than you would just using the dropper br br i waited 2 minutes and took a cotton ball to swipe the nail to see if the polish would come off it started to but just the top layer i re soaked them in the product for 3 more minutes and i was able to remove the polish from my nails i should also mention that i use orly bonding base coat which helps the polish adhere to the nail i also had 3 coats of polish and a top coat so that might be why the polish was so stubborn to come off plus it was a deep red which is difficult to remove no matter what you are using and it usually dyes my nail beds a bit when i'm removing the polish anyway as a positive i did notice that this product was much less harmful on my nails my acetone remover immediately dries out my nails and strips all the healthy oils from the nails and nail beds this did not do that my nails had a nice healthy shine to them and the nail beds retained their moisture which is nice br br so in summary i love that this product is natural and non toxic but it's just not practical for me to spend 5 minutes soaking my nails to wait for the polish to come off however if you are super green and more willing to commit to being patient in order to be able to use something that has no chemicals and is good for your body and those around you which i commend you for then this is a great substitute for chemical nail polish removers

it s super nice having another starbucks on the other side of the highway as it cuts down on time when i m south of i love the location unfortunately when it comes to the food beverages it s a different story i ve gone in several days in a row since they have opened and have had nothing but problems to start i ordered a decaf drink which was not made as decaf i have a caffeine sensitivity that causes heart issues for me so after drinking my beverage i experienced an extremely high heart rate for the better part of two hours i ve also ordered white mocha hot chocolates a couple times and received the white mochas with coffee instead luckily i can taste the difference when coffee is in a drink so i was able to avoid any caffeine effects on my heart but nonetheless still disappointing in regard to the taste and make of the beverages themselves i ve also been pretty disappointed any drink containing syrup and milk tends to only taste like milk so i m unsure if the proper proportions of each ingredient are being used or if the recipes are being followed correctly i also believe there is something wrong with their nitrogen when it comes to the nitro cold brew more than half of the cup ends up being foam even after the drink settles the amount of cold brew i receive in a grande is not even enough to fill up a tall cup lastly i ve noticed that when i ask for extra caramel drizzle they are only using as much as a normal order and not coating the cup drink in the necessary places there has been several times where i will ask for cinnamon to be steamed into milk and it is not being done the taste difference is something you can t miss on that nonetheless watching the baristas so customizations aren t always being followed i ve also ordered food several times only to receive the incorrect item just this morning i ordered a double smoked bacon sandwich with no egg only to receive an impossible sandwich while the customer service is great and everyone is friendly i question if the baristas have received enough proper training i m in a bit of a rut because i desperately want to shop at this location frequently as the location is convenient and the store itself is absolutely beautiful and very well kept and clean however it becomes stressful worrying about my health when it comes to receiving non decaf when asking for decaf it s also such a let down for the place to be as inconsistent as it is i can understand that things happen but the same issues occurring again and again every visit cannot be a coincidence i don t feel comfortable spending on breakfast or lunch knowing that it will have some issue and i will not always have the time to flag down an employee for a drink or food remake this place has amazing potential but there s definitely some kinks that need to be worked out i will probably spend the extra time to drive to the starbucks on the other side of the highway as i know the small amount of wait time will be worth knowing i m receiving food and beverage to the starbucks standard we all know and love

i ve been to this starbucks a few times in the past today i visited through the drive thru they were pretty quick to take my order at the speaker and i was able to confirm that the order was correct on the large screen i wanted to try their new espresso today and ordered a blonde flat white i also ordered a spinach feta wrap my go to breakfast sandwich only calories made with egg white feta cheese roasted tomatoes and spinach in a crunchy wrap yummy the drive thru line moved rather quickly once i got up to the drive thru window it took a while before i was even acknowledged when i received my coffee it was made incorrectly even though it clearly stated how i wanted it on the screen when i ordered at this point the drive thru line began to back up not only because i had to wait to be acknowledged and pay but also because now they had to make the drink correctly starbucks is known for wanting you to be satisfied with your drink otherwise they will remake it which they did and they did a fine job i just felt bad for the growing line of cars behind me while i typically like a strong coffee the blonde flat white was surprisingly sweet and smooth i would definitely order it again the spinach feta wrap was piping hot which i prefer i ve gotten the same breakfast sandwich at other starbucks and there have been many times it s still cold in the middle yuck overall it was a good visit i have yet to find a starbucks that compares to the location in carrollwood but because i pass this location certain times during the week i would definitely return for convenience alone

i have tried a few products by this line by laloirelle this age defy face oil comes in a dark glass dropper bottle like a lot of facial oils do it is not cheap at almost 100 to be honest when you use this you will need about a drop for each side of your face so a little does go a long way but this is still not an inexpensive product so handle this as such br br this particular one is filled with marula oil rosehip oil reishi mushroom ginseng and cordyceps mushroom this particular blend is supposed to help with wrinkles acne scars and dry skin when you use this you will notice this oil definitely has a fragrance to it that is reminiscent of an essential oil they recommend to use it morning and night however in my experience when you use this it does absorb fairly quickly it does leave an oily residue on your skin though if you wear makeup and especially right now with wearing masks i would not recommend applying this facial oil in the morning for a makeup application that could cause trouble and i found with facial oils i sweat heavily when wearing masks br br it is definitely moisturizing and does work for dry skin however i did feel that my skin felt oily which is why i prefer using this in the evening in the morning my skin felt nicely moisturized is this really worth the price in my eyes not really since i have other moisturizers that do the same thing and cost a fraction of this oil while not making my face greasy

maybe it was just an off day or maybe it was because of training new people but this was kind of a confusing starbucks experience i guess i might be spoiled because most starbucks locations really get the concept of the customer experience right a quick stop in for a nice chilly frappuccino on this hot afternoon started out a little bit strange when i was the next customer in line and an employee standing at an empty till caught my eye and smiled brightly i started to walk toward her and give her my order and the employee at the other till who had been helping the customer in front of me broke off to reprimand me for trying to cut in front of that customer i felt quite taken aback at the intensity of his response to what was obviously a misunderstanding i could barely even get out the words i m so sorry i thought she was asking me to come up and order when it was my turn for real and not for pretend it became apparent that she was a brand new employee being trained and thus it was no surprise that it was a slightly confusing process to get my card reloaded my items run in and finally paid for no big deal in itself we have all been learners at something at some point in our lives perhaps this brand new employee also learned that it sends a mixed message to customers waiting in line when you make eye contact and smile at them but you are totally not ready for them to actually come up and order however when i picked up my drink it had not been marked correctly so it wasn t quite right however it was close so i just took it and left i clearly needed to consume some of that caffeine before trying to wrap my brain around any more confusion

i bought 2 of these one for myself and one for my mom my mom liked it but i did not i have always used wooden back brushes with natural bristles but decided to try a plastic one to see if it would last longer i have never liked nylon bristles and sometimes they irritate my skin the description said that the bristles on this brush were boar bristles br br first problem i noticed was the handle was shorter than i was used to i am a short average build guy and i have some difficulty reaching my entire back easily with it second issue the bristles are some sort of soft plastic not boar as advertised the bristles are tightly packed which is nice but very soft they didn't irritate my skin like some but the softness left me questioning how clean my back was getting the tightly packed bristles seem like a great feature but after you use it a couple of times you realize that it makes air tough to get through the bristles so the brush takes longer to dry than most if you don't really sling the remaining water out of them and or pat down with a cloth the brush may still be damp the next time you go to use it which doesn't seem hygienic the last issue i have with this back brush is there are no grips or non slip material where you hold it it can become kind of slippery and cumbersome when the handle gets wet br br this does seem to be a well made brush that should last a long time it just wasn't for me it is definitely better than the the plastic back brushes you find in most retail stores my mom loves it she kept hers and i was easily able to get return authorization through amazon with no issues for mine going back to a wooden natural bristle brush sometimes it's better to stick with what you know

located under the radar within a target department store this hidden gem of reno is must see for anyone looking for a good coffee and even better service this coffee shop bleeds the kind of atmosphere you thought only existed on television you can sit back and relax with your coffee for a minute as the world moves around you a melting pot of people bustle back and forth within the red walls of the store in a rush for the hottest deals as almost character like employees interact and whip up drinks with a frenzied synergy that contradicts your expectations of what working for a soul crushing seattle based corporation must be like with dazzling smiles the baristas address their customers by name it is clear that the people warmly taking in their morning coffee are regulars they could go anywhere so why do they go here to a chain located within a chain it can only be because of the excellent customer service the dynamic dark roast duo behind the counter are named diana and kelsey and between discussing the intricacies of french cinema and canine american rights they are delivering the precise orders of their dazzled customers at a lightning pace curious to see how they would treat a newcomer i approached the counter and struggled to figure out what to purchase with a smile kelsey suggested i try a crystal ball drink that resembled the bad guy in the last spider man movie diana interjected and suggested a variation of the drink that was much better this personal touch and recommendation had me instantly sold despite my eager enthusiasm they even offered to let me sample it first assuring me it was not a problem it was like they d known me for years and i instantly understood why so many people chose to visit this location the drink was made to perfection and in that crystal ball drink i saw myself returning here in my future the service didn t stop there though after offering me an ice cold water they managed to inject the frozen h o croutons very adeptly i watched as an errant child projectile vomited all over the wall his mother nowhere to be found the girls were on top of it instantly cleaning the mess and directing customers with practiced ease while calling for assistance with the child i was stunned by their rapid response to add to the situation i watched as a target employee stumbled over and attempted to rattle the girls with incessant questions about a show called duck tales with patient looks the girls answered his questions to satisfaction and it became clear to me that they were truly prepared for anything this red walled hub might throw at them do yourself a favor and visit this starbucks located within target if diana and kelsey are making drinks with confidence as cool as the frappuccinos i can guarantee you ll leave with a smile parking kinda sucks though
